# CEFR Ready

> แพลตฟอร์มฝึกทำข้อสอบภาษาอังกฤษมาตรฐาน CEFR สำหรับนักศึกษาไทย โดยเฉพาะผู้เตรียมสอบ CEFR มทส (SUT) และมหาวิทยาลัยอื่นๆ ที่ใช้มาตรฐาน CEFR

## What is CEFR Ready?

CEFR Ready is a free online practice platform for the CEFR (Common European Framework of Reference for Languages) English proficiency exam. It provides 120+ practice questions across 4 test types that mirror real CEFR exam formats used by Thai universities.

**Target audience:** Thai university students preparing for CEFR exams, particularly at Suranaree University of Technology (SUT / มทส) and other institutions.

**Language:** Platform UI is in Thai; exam questions are in English.

## Key Features

- **Free access** — No subscription or payment required
- **4 exam types**: Focus on Form, Focus on Meaning, Form & Meaning, Listening
- **CEFR levels**: A1 through C2
- **Full explanations** for every question in Thai
- **Progress tracking** for registered users (Google login)
- **Must Know** grammar library — reference articles for exam prep

## Exam Types

### Focus on Form
Tests grammatical structures including verb forms, tenses, prepositions, and sentence patterns. Questions are multiple-choice.

### Focus on Meaning
Tests vocabulary knowledge including synonyms, antonyms, and contextual word usage. Questions are multiple-choice.

### Form & Meaning
Article-based fill-in-the-blank questions combining grammar and vocabulary within a reading passage context.

### Listening
Audio-based comprehension questions. Students listen to short dialogues and answer multiple-choice questions.

## Pricing

- **Free tier**: Full access to all 5-question demo tests (no account required)
- **Full access**: Free — requires Google account login
- **Admin**: Not publicly available

## Key URLs

- Homepage: https://cefr-ready.vercel.app/
- Practice tests: https://cefr-ready.vercel.app/tests
- Demo tests (no login): https://cefr-ready.vercel.app/demo
- Grammar library: https://cefr-ready.vercel.app/must-know
- Progress tracking: https://cefr-ready.vercel.app/progress
- Sitemap: https://cefr-ready.vercel.app/sitemap.xml

## What is CEFR?

The Common European Framework of Reference for Languages (CEFR) is an international standard for measuring language proficiency across 6 levels:

| Level | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| A1 | Beginner — very basic expressions |
| A2 | Elementary — familiar everyday expressions |
| B1 | Intermediate — can handle most travel situations |
| B2 | Upper-Intermediate — can interact with native speakers |
| C1 | Advanced — can use language flexibly for social and academic purposes |
| C2 | Mastery — near-native level proficiency |

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Is CEFR Ready free?**
A: Yes, 100% free. No credit card, no subscription.

**Q: Do I need to create an account?**
A: You can try demo tests (5 questions each) without an account. Full tests with progress tracking require a Google account login.

**Q: Can I use CEFR Ready to prepare for the SUT CEFR exam?**
A: Yes. The exam questions are designed to match the format and difficulty of the CEFR exam used at Suranaree University of Technology (มทส) and similar institutions.

**Q: How many practice questions are available?**
A: 120+ questions across all 4 exam types, each covering CEFR levels A1-C2.

**Q: Are answers and explanations provided?**
A: Yes. Every question includes a detailed explanation in Thai after submission.
